aci_connector_linux.description: Enables or disables the ACI Connector for Linux containers in the Kubernetes cluster. Requires the Kubernetes cluster to have the appropriate configuration for virtual nodes.

api_server_access_profile.description: Configures API server access settings, including private cluster enablement, authorized IP ranges, and Azure RBAC integration.

api_server_authorized_ip_ranges.description: Defines the list of IP ranges that are permitted to access the Kubernetes API server. Use CIDR notation. Empty list disables restrictions.

auto_scaler_profile.description: Configuration for the cluster's autoscaler profile, defining scaling behavior such as thresholds and cooldown periods.
auto_scaler_profile.type: list(object({balance_similar_node_groups: optional(bool),empty_bulk_delete_max: optional(string),expander: optional(string),max_graceful_termination_sec: optional(string),max_node_provisioning_time: optional(string),max_unready_nodes: optional(number),max_unready_percentage: optional(number),new_pod_scale_up_delay: optional(string),scale_down_delay_after_add: optional(string),scale_down_delay_after_delete: optional(string),scale_down_delay_after_failure: optional(string),scale_down_unneeded: optional(string),scale_down_unready: optional(string),scale_down_utilization_threshold: optional(string),scan_interval: optional(string),skip_nodes_with_local_storage: optional(bool),skip_nodes_with_system_pods: optional(bool)}))

automatic_channel_upgrade.description: Specifies the upgrade channel for the Kubernetes cluster, determining the frequency and type of automatic upgrades. Valid options include "patch", "rapid", or "stable".

azure_active_directory_role_based_access.description: Enables integration with Azure Active Directory for Kubernetes role-based access control; requires an existing Azure AD tenant and service principal configuration.
azure_active_directory_role_based_access.type: list(object({admin_group_object_ids: optional(list(string)),azure_rbac_enabled: optional(bool),client_app_id: optional(string),managed: optional(bool),server_app_id: optional(string),server_app_secret: optional(string),tenant_id: optional(string)}))

azure_policy_enabled.description: Determines whether Azure Policy is enabled for the Kubernetes cluster, enforcing compliance and governance rules. Must be set to `true` or `false`.

confidential_computing.description: Enables confidential computing nodes in the cluster to provide enhanced security for sensitive workloads; requires supported VM SKU.

cost_analysis_enabled.description: Specifies whether cost analysis and reporting features are enabled for the Kubernetes cluster.

custom_ca_trust_certificates_base64.description: Base64-encoded custom CA certificates to be added to the trusted root CA list of the cluster. Must be valid and properly formatted.

default_node_pool.description: Defines the configuration for the default node pool in the Kubernetes cluster, including size, count, and type of nodes.
default_node_pool.type: list(object({capacity_reservation_group_id: optional(string),custom_ca_trust_enabled: optional(bool),enable_auto_scaling: optional(bool),enable_host_encryption: disk_encryption_set_id.description: ID of the disk encryption set to be used for encrypting the cluster's managed disks; must be an existing resource in the same region as the cluster.

dns_prefix.description: Specifies the DNS prefix used to create a fully qualified domain name for the Kubernetes cluster. Must be globally unique within Azure.

dns_prefix_private_cluster.description: Specifies the DNS prefix used for the private cluster, must be unique within the Azure region and conform to DNS naming conventions.

edge_zone.description: Specifies the Azure Edge Zone where the Kubernetes cluster will be deployed, must be a valid Edge Zone name within the selected region.

enable_pod_security_policy.description: Controls whether the Kubernetes cluster enforces pod security policies. Set to true to enable pod-level security restrictions.

http_application_routing_enabled.description: Enables HTTP application routing add-on for the Kubernetes cluster, allowing DNS zone creation for ingress endpoints. Must be set to true or false.

http_proxy_config.description: Configuration for HTTP proxy settings used by the cluster, including proxy server addresses and exclusions.

identity.description: Defines the managed identity type and configuration used for the Kubernetes cluster, required for resource access and role assignments.

image_cleaner_enabled.description: Enables the image cleaner feature to automatically remove unused images from the cluster.

image_cleaner_interval_hours.description: Specifies the interval, in hours, at which unused container images are cleaned up in the Kubernetes cluster. Must be a positive integer.

ingress_application_gateway.description: Configures the integration of an Application Gateway with the Kubernetes cluster for ingress traffic management. Requires an existing Application Gateway or specifies settings to create one.

key_management_service.description: Specifies the configuration for integrating Azure Key Management Service with the Kubernetes cluster for enhanced security and encryption.

key_vault_secrets_provider.description: Specifies whether the Key Vault Secrets Provider is enabled for integrating Azure Key Vault with the Kubernetes cluster.

kubelet_identity.description: Specifies the identity assigned to the kubelet in the Kubernetes cluster, used for managing permissions and accessing Azure resources.

kubernetes_version.description: Specifies the version of Kubernetes to be used for the cluster; must be a supported version by Azure Kubernetes Service.

linux_profile.description: Defines the configuration for Linux-based nodes, including admin username and SSH key for secure access.

local_account_disabled.description: Determines whether local accounts are disabled for the Kubernetes cluster, enhancing security by requiring Azure Active Directory authentication.

maintenance_window.description: Specifies the recurring maintenance window for the cluster, including days and time constraints during which maintenance operations are allowed.
maintenance_window.type: list(object({allowed: list(object({day: string,hours: list(number)})),not_allowed: list(object({end: string,start: string}))}))

maintenance_window_auto_upgrade.description: Specifies whether automatic upgrades are enabled during the maintenance window for the Kubernetes cluster.
maintenance_window_auto_upgrade.type: list(object({day_of_month: optional(number),day_of_week: optional(string),duration: number,frequency: string,interval: number,start_date: optional(string),start_time: optional(string),utc_offset: optional(string),week_index: optional(string),not_allowed: list(object({end: string,start: string}))}))

maintenance_window_node_os.description: Defines the preferred time range for node operating system updates during the maintenance window. Must be specified in the format "HH:mm-HH:mm" using 24-hour time.
maintenance_window_node_os.type: list(object({day_of_month: optional(number),day_of_week: optional(string),duration: number,frequency: string,interval: number,start_date: optional(string),start_time: optional(string),utc_offset: optional(string),week_index: optional(string),not_allowed: list(object({end: string,start: string}))}))

microsoft_defender.description: Enables or disables Microsoft Defender integration for the Kubernetes cluster. Must be set to 'Enabled' or 'Disabled'.

monitor_metrics.description: Determines whether Azure Monitor metrics are enabled for the Kubernetes cluster. Requires an existing Log Analytics workspace for integration.

name.description: Specifies the name of the Kubernetes cluster, which must be unique within the resource group and comply with Azure's naming rules.

network_profile.description: Defines the network configuration for the Kubernetes cluster, including network plugin, DNS service IP, and pod CIDR. Ensure compatibility with the cluster's subnet and resource group settings.
network_profile.type: list(object({dns_service_ip: optional(string),docker_bridge_cidr: optional(string),ebpf_data_plane: optional(string),ip_versions: optional(list(string)),load_balancer_sku: optional(string),network_data_plane: optional(string),network_mode: optional(string),network_plugin: string,network_plugin_mode: optional(string),network_policy: optional(string),outbound_ip_address_ids: optional(list(string)),outbound_ip_prefix_ids: optional(list(string)),outbound_type: optional(string),pod_cidr: optional(string),pod_cidrs: optional(list(string)),service_cidr: optional(string),service_cidrs: optional(list(string)),load_balancer_profile: list(object({effective_outbound_ips: optional(list(string)),idle_timeout_in_minutes: optional(number),managed_outbound_ip_count: optional(number),managed_outbound_ipv6_count: optional(number),outbound_ip_address_ids: optional(list(string)),outbound_ip_prefix_ids: optional(list(string)),outbound_ports_allocated: optional(number)})),nat_gateway_profile: list(object({effective_outbound_ips: optional(list(string)),idle_timeout_in_minutes: optional(number),managed_outbound_ip_count: optional(number)}))}))

node_os_channel_upgrade.description: Specifies the OS channel upgrade type for nodes in the Kubernetes cluster, controlling the update cadence and stability.

node_resource_group.description: Specifies the name of the resource group where the cluster's nodes and managed resources will be created. Must be unique within the Azure subscription.

oidc_issuer_enabled.description: Enables OIDC issuer integration for the Kubernetes cluster; must be set to true if OIDC-based authentication or workload identity is required.

oms_agent.description: Enables monitoring with Azure Monitor for containers; requires Log Analytics Workspace integration.

open_service_mesh_enabled.description: Enables Open Service Mesh integration for the Kubernetes cluster; requires Kubernetes version 1.19.0 or later.

private_cluster_enabled.description: Determines whether private cluster mode is enabled, restricting access to the Kubernetes API server to private endpoints only.

private_cluster_public_fqdn_enabled.description: Specifies whether the public fully qualified domain name (FQDN) is enabled for the private cluster.

private_dns_zone_id.description: ID of an existing private DNS zone to associate with the Kubernetes cluster; required for private cluster configuration.

public_network_access_enabled.description: Determines whether public network access is enabled for the Kubernetes cluster; must be true to allow access from outside the private network.

role_based_access_control_enabled.description: Enables or disables Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) for managing access permissions in the Kubernetes cluster.

run_command_enabled.description: Determines if the ability to execute run commands on the Kubernetes cluster is enabled; must be set to true or false.

service_mesh_profile.description: Specifies the configuration for enabling and managing service mesh features within the Kubernetes cluster.
service_mesh_profile.type: list(object({external_ingress_gateway_enabled: optional(bool),internal_ingress_gateway_enabled: optional(bool),mode: string,certificate_authority: list(object({cert_chain_object_name: string,cert_object_name: string,key_object_name: string,key_vault_id: string,root_cert_object_name: string}))}))

service_principal.description: Service principal credentials used for authenticating with Azure, required for managing the Kubernetes cluster.

sku_tier.description: Defines the pricing tier for the Kubernetes cluster, such as "Free" or "Paid".

storage_profile.description: Defines the storage configuration for agent nodes, specifying disk size, type, and other related settings.

support_plan.description: Specifies the Azure support plan for the Kubernetes cluster; options include Standard, Basic, or Advanced.

tags.description: Defines custom tags to categorize and organize the Kubernetes cluster. Tags must be key-value pairs and adhere to Azure's tag naming conventions.

timeouts.description: Defines custom time limits for create, read, update, and delete operations on the Kubernetes cluster.

web_app_routing.description: Enables web application routing for the Kubernetes cluster, allowing automatic DNS management and ingress configuration.

windows_profile.description: Configuration for Windows node pool in the Kubernetes cluster, including administrator username and password requirements.
windows_profile.type: list(object({admin_password: optional(string),admin_username: string,license: optional(string),gmsa: list(object({dns_server: string,root_domain: string}))}))

workload_autoscaler_profile.description: Configures the autoscaler settings for workloads, including constraints such as minimum and maximum node counts for scaling.

workload_identity_enabled.description: Enables or disables Azure AD Workload Identity integration for the Kubernetes cluster; requires Azure AD integration to be configured.

resource_group_name.description: Name of the resource group that this resource will be created in.

location.description: Location that this resource will be created in. (e.g. eastus2, southeastasia)
